enrichment.program_priorities: Medical field organizations (broad), Pulmonary/Pulmonic conditions (specific focus noted), Schools and cultural organizations (per IRS activity codes)
enrichment.enrichment_notes: {"POSITIVE: Foundation has explicit medical field focus","POSITIVE: Located in San Francisco - California-based enables relationship building","POSITIVE: Significantly larger than average foundation assets suggest capacity to fund","POSITIVE: Patient safety could potentially fit within 'medical field' scope if pulmonary-focused","CONCERN: Specific focus on pulmonic/pulmonary conditions may narrow fit unless PSMF has respiratory care alignment","CONCERN: No documented interest in healthcare quality or patient safety specifically","CONCERN: Very limited public information - difficulty assessing true priorities","CONCERN: No published grant guidelines or application process","CONCERN: Administrative structure through bank suggests older foundation with formal giving patterns"}
